groups.name: hephaestus.sync
groups.description: Provider-agnostic sync scheduler settings (run-on-startup, cron, cooldown, backfill, filters)

groups.name: hephaestus.integration.github.sync
groups.description: GitHub-specific sync tuning (GraphQL timeouts, incremental buffer, backfill page size)

groups.name: hephaestus.sync.nats
groups.description: NATS JetStream integration for real-time event processing

groups.name: hephaestus.integration.github
groups.description: GitHub API authentication and App configuration

groups.name: hephaestus.activity
groups.description: Activity event tracking and XP scoring settings

groups.name: hephaestus.integration.slack
groups.description: Slack integration toggle and OAuth client credentials

groups.name: hephaestus.agent.image
groups.description: Shared image reference for the Pi practice + mentor agent runtime

properties.name: hephaestus.leaderboard.schedule.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for leaderboard calculation

properties.name: hephaestus.activity.self-review-author-logins
properties.description: List of bot logins whose PRs are excluded from self-review scoring

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.github.sync.graphql-timeout
properties.description: Timeout for standard GraphQL operations (default: 30s). Accepts duration format: 30s, 1m, PT30S

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.github.sync.extended-graphql-timeout
properties.description: Extended timeout for complex GraphQL operations like review comments (default: 60s). Accepts duration format: 60s, 1m, PT60S

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.github.sync.pagination-throttle
properties.description: Delay between pagination requests to avoid hammering GitHub's API (default: 200ms). Accepts duration format: 200ms, PT0.2S

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.github.sync.incremental-sync-enabled
properties.description: Whether to use incremental sync based on last sync timestamp

properties.name: hephaestus.sync.cooldown-minutes
properties.description: Minimum minutes between consecutive sync operations

properties.name: hephaestus.sync.nats.enabled
properties.description: Whether NATS JetStream integration is enabled

properties.name: hephaestus.sync.nats.server
properties.description: NATS server URL (e.g., nats://localhost:4222)

properties.name: hephaestus.sync.nats.durable-consumer-name
properties.description: Durable consumer name for JetStream subscriptions (empty for ephemeral)

properties.name: hephaestus.sync.nats.replay-timeframe-days
properties.description: Number of days to replay messages when starting a new consumer

properties.name: hephaestus.posthog.enabled
properties.description: Whether PostHog analytics is enabled

properties.name: hephaestus.posthog.api-host
properties.description: PostHog API host URL

properties.name: hephaestus.posthog.project-id
properties.description: PostHog project ID

properties.name: hephaestus.posthog.personal-api-key
properties.description: PostHog personal API key (use environment variable in production)

properties.name: hephaestus.webapp.url
properties.description: Base URL of the webapp for generating links

properties.name: hephaestus.workspace.init-default
properties.description: Whether to bootstrap a PAT-based workspace on startup (for local development)

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.slack.enabled
properties.description: Master toggle for the Slack integration (OAuth install, lifecycle listeners, outbound messaging)

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.slack.client-id
properties.description: Slack OAuth client id used by SlackOAuthClient during oauth.v2.access

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.slack.client-secret
properties.description: Slack OAuth client secret used by SlackOAuthClient during oauth.v2.access

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.slack.redirect-uri
properties.description: Redirect URI registered on the Slack app; must match the SlackConnectionStrategy authorize URL

properties.name: hephaestus.integration.slack.api-base
properties.description: Base URL of the Slack API. Defaults to https://slack.com; override in tests to point at a mock server.

properties.name: hephaestus.sentry.dsn
properties.description: Sentry DSN for error tracking; leave blank to disable

properties.name: hephaestus.agent.image.reference
properties.description: Image reference used by Pi practice sandboxes and the mentor container. Production must be digest-pinned (registry/path@sha256:<64 lowercase hex>).

properties.name: hephaestus.agent.image.pull-policy
properties.description: Startup pull behaviour.

properties.name: hephaestus.agent.image.require-digest
properties.description: When true, AgentImagePinGuard fails startup unless 'reference' is digest-pinned.

values.description: Production — digest-pinned. Imported by spring.config.import from the signed release asset.
